title: Sections of code should not be commented out
description: Sections of code should not be commented outAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEunusedWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?Commented-out code distracts the focus from the actual executed code. It creates a noise that increases maintenance code. And because it is never executed, it quickly becomes out of date and invalid.Commented-out code should be deleted and can be retrieved from source control history if required.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Multiple consecutive comment lines containing code patterns

conditions: Comments contain code patterns (method calls, assignments, keywords)

logic.reasoning: Detects commented-out code that creates maintenance burden. Uses custom function to identify consecutive comment lines containing code patterns like method calls, assignments, control flow keywords. Excludes legitimate comments: XML docs, TODO markers, license headers, and natural language explanations.
